reasoning: The NEOM 'The Line' project has been widely reported to have been vastly scaled back, with its medium-term (2030) construction goal reduced from 170 kilometers to just 2.4 kilometers, and expected population reduced from 1.5 million to under 300,000. The long-time CEO abruptly departed in November 2024 amidst reports of budget constraints, and recent reporting in 2025 confirms continued delays and scaling back. The resolution criteria allow the creator discretion to resolve YES if the project is "scaled back to something vastly more modest". A 98% reduction in the near-term build out and severe trimming of the population unambiguously meet this definition. The Manifold probability was around 0.90 on May 15, 2025, which indicates high market consensus that the vast scale-back has occurred. As we are just 5 days from the resolution date, I expect the creator to resolve YES based on the significant downscaling already documented.
